channel.title: Mark Breaux | Senior Information Architect
channel.description: Recent content on Mark Breaux | Senior Information Architect

item.title: Resume
item.description:
Mark Breaux

[City, State] | [Phone] | [Email] | [LinkedIn URL]

Professional Summary

Senior Information Architect with 21 years of progressive experience at NI, delivering enterprise-scale documentation strategies, content architectures, and toolchain solutions for a product portfolio of nearly 5,000 products. Deep practitioner expertise in DITA, metadata and taxonomy design, and AI/LLM content readiness. Recognized for a research-driven, analytical approach and a demonstrated ability to influence stakeholders at all levels of a large organization. Supports a community of 30–50 technical writers with architectures, templates, and standards that scale.
